text:

diff -ruN tor-devel.orig/Makefile tor-devel/Makefile
--- tor-devel.orig/Makefile	Mon Jul 31 17:49:22 2006
+++ tor-devel/Makefile	Mon Jul 31 17:49:40 2006
@@ -6,8 +6,7 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	tor
-PORTVERSION=	0.1.1.22
-PORTREVISION=	1
+PORTVERSION=	0.1.1.23
 CATEGORIES=	security net
 MASTER_SITES=	http://tor.eff.org/dist/ \
 		http://mirror.onionland.org/dist/

+++ tor-devel/distinfo	Mon Jul 31 17:49:55 2006
